items.title: EV startup Faraday Future paid $7.5M to company tied to founder Jia Yueting
items.description: The perpetually-struggling EV company made the payments while being investigated by the SEC. That four-year-long probe was ultimately closed in March.

items.title: OpenAI announces new advanced security for ChatGPT accounts, including a partnership with Yubico
items.description: OpenAI is launching additional opt-in protections for ChatGPT accounts. The new security initiative includes a new partnership with security key provider Yubico.

items.title: Elon Musk testifies that xAI trained Grok on OpenAI models
items.description: "Distillation" is a hot topic as frontier labs try to prevent smaller competitors from copying their models.

items.title: FDA approval, fundraising, and the reality of building in healthcare according to BioticsAI founder
items.description: BioticsAI CEO Robhy Bustami joined Isabelle Johannessen on Build Mode to discuss how the company has navigated a highly regulated space and kept the team motivated while cutting through all the red tape.

items.title: Google’s Gemini AI assistant is hitting the road in millions of vehicles
items.description: The move signals Google’s push to bring more advanced, conversational AI into the driving experience.

items.title: TikTok’s new ‘Campus Hub’ features college group chats and feeds
items.description: The new hub features dedicated college group chats and personalized feeds designed to help students stay connected with their campus communities, even while they’re away for the summer.

items.title: Stripe introduces Link, a digital wallet that autonomous AI agents can use, too
items.description: Link lets users connect cards, banks, and subscriptions, then authorize AI agents to spend securely via approval flows.

items.title: Salesforce is crowdsourcing its AI roadmap — with customers
items.description: Salesforce lets its customers lead its product roadmap with the thinking that if one enterprise customer has a problem, the others likely do too.

items.title: Uber taps Hertz to clean, charge, and fix its Lucid Motors robotaxis
items.description: Hertz is creating a new affiliate company called "Oro Mobility" to provide fleet management solutions "across a range of mobility segments."

items.title: SpaceX backer 137 Ventures raises $700M for two growth-stage funds
items.description: VC firm 137 Ventures has raised over $700 million to back growth-stage startups. Its portfolio includes SpaceX, Anduril, Hadrian.

items.title: Dental practice software maker fixes bug that exposed patients’ medical records
items.description: The security bug is now fixed, but the patient who found it said it was challenging to alert the software company about the issue.

items.title: X announces a rebuilt ad platform powered by AI
items.description: X is rolling out a rebuilt ads platform powered by AI as it works to grow revenue again.

items.title: Spotify introduces verified artist badges to help distinguish humans from AI
items.description: Spotify looks for an identifiable artist presence both on and off platform, like concert dates, merch, and linked social accounts on their artist profile.

items.title: Netflix wants you to watch ‘Clips,’ its TikTok-like vertical video feed
items.description: Netflix is redesigning its mobile app and introducing Clips, a vertical video feed intended to help users discover new content by sharing highlights from original Netflix programming.

items.title: Meta says its business AI now facilitates 10 million conversations a week
items.description: Meta said over 8 billion advertisers have used at least one of its GenAI tools

items.title: Instagram cracks down on content aggregators
items.description: The update targets content aggregators that don't post original content and instead simply re-upload others' posts.

items.title: SoftBank is creating a robotics company that builds data centers — and already eyeing a $100B IPO
items.description: You need infrastructure to build AI and robots, but apparently you also need AI and robots to build infrastructure.

items.title: Amazon, Meta join fight to end Google Pay, PhonePe dominance in India
items.description: PhonePe and Google Pay command 80% of India's UPI instant payments network. Rivals are set to meet with regulators to lobby for restrictions.

items.title: Amazon’s cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending
items.description: The e-commerce giant is making more money than expected from AWS but it's also spending a lot, and will continue to do so in the near term, its chief executive said.

items.title: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B
items.description: The maker of Claude has received multiple preemptive offers at valuations in the $850 billion to $900 billion range, according to sources familiar with the matter.
